campaign.title: What Day.News Does for Local Businesses
campaign.subject: Something is happening in local marketing
campaign.description: Briefing on what the community media network is and how businesses participate

landing_page.ai_goal: Make the business owner understand what we are and see the opportunity

slides.title: Your Community Has a Media Network

content.headline: [Community Name] Day.News
content.subhead: Your community's newspaper, event calendar, business directory, and more.
content.visual: Day.News homepage showing local news, events, and businesses

slides.narration: Hi. I'm going to show you something that exists for your community right now. It's called Day.News, and it's your community's local newspaper, event calendar, business directory, website network, and newsletter. No other organization does all of this for your community. Let me walk you through it.

slides.title: What We Are

content.headline: Five Things We Do for [Community Name]

elements.label: Local Newspaper
elements.desc: Daily community news read by [X] residents

elements.label: Event Calendar
elements.desc: GoEventCity — every local event in one place

elements.label: Website Network
elements.desc: AlphaSite — professional web presence for every business

slides.narration: Here's what we are, specifically. We're your community's local newspaper — we publish daily. We're the event calendar — GoEventCity lists every local event. We're the downtown guide — the business directory for your community. We're the website network — AlphaSite gives every participating business a professional web presence. And we publish a weekly newsletter to thousands of local subscribers. Nobody else does all of this.

slides.title: Your Community by the Numbers
slides.narration: Here are the numbers for your community right now. These are real, live numbers — not projections. This many people are reading. This many businesses are participating. And out of 37 total premium positions, this many are already taken.

slides.title: How Businesses Participate

content.headline: What Participating Businesses Get
points: Your business mentioned in community news coverage — not as an ad, as part of the story
Your events promoted to local event seekers automatically
Your listing ranks above non-participating businesses in every directory
A professional web presence that connects to everything
Your coupons, announcements, and classifieds reach local subscribers

slides.narration: When a business participates, here's what happens. Your business gets mentioned in community news — not as an ad, as part of the community story. Your events get promoted. Your listing ranks above businesses that aren't participating. You get a professional web presence connected to the whole network. And everything you publish — coupons, announcements, classifieds — reaches local subscribers directly.

slides.title: Nobody Else Does This

content.headline: Not Facebook. Not Google. Not Yelp. Us.

comparison.others: Individual platforms that do one thing. Not connected. Not local. Not community-focused.
comparison.us: One integrated network — newspaper, events, directory, web, newsletter — built for your community.

content.key_point: No other organization provides a complete local media network for [Community Name].

slides.narration: I want to be direct about something. No other organization does what we do for your community. Facebook is a social network — it's not local news. Google is a search engine — it's not a community directory. Yelp is a review site — it doesn't publish local news or promote events. We do all of it, connected, for your community. That's the difference.

slides.title: Get Started

content.headline: Your Next Step
content.body: Claim your listing — it's free and takes 5 minutes. Or see your community's current status.
content.slot_status: [X] of 37 positions filled in [Community Name]. [Y] remain in [Category].

slides.narration: Your next step is simple. Claim your listing — it's free and takes five minutes. Or check your community's current status to see how many positions are available in your category. I'll be in touch with more details. If you have questions, just reply to any email.

slides.title: Your Account Manager

content.headline: I'm Here to Help
content.body: I'm [AM Name], your account manager. I'll keep you updated on your community and your category.

slides.narration: I'm your account manager. My job is to make sure your business has the best position possible in your community's network. I'll keep you updated on availability in your category. If you have questions, reach out anytime.
